global.description: Allows the chart to be used as a sub chart, in which case the main charts settings is made available in this object.

ingress.description: Injected by ApplicationSet — not used by this chart

managementPolicies.description: Should buckets be observed or controlled.

deletionPolicy.description: Should records be deleted or left orphan. S3 buckets cannot be deleted when they contain buckes. In most cases 'Orphan' would be the correct choice.

buckets.description: List of S3 buckets to manage.

name.description: The name of the bucket. Must be a valid Kubernetes resource name (DNS-1123 label): lowercase alphanumeric and '-', 3-63 chars.

region.description: The AWS region of the bucket.

publicRead.description: Expose objects publicly via BucketPolicy (GetObject on bucket/*). Requires PublicAccessBlock.blockPublicPolicy=false.

tags.description: Additional tags to set on the bucket
